top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN atom.molecule_id END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT atom.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Cl';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN atom.molecule_id END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT atom.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN a.molecule_id END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id;

    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Cl';

FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';

FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN atom.element = 'Cl' THEN atom.molecule_id END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT atom.molecule_id) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom
JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%';
